violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution for the sanitizer buckets/3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 - 400 ppm. Bleach is to be used at proper concentration (50 - 100 ppm) for the sanitizer buckets/3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026

The receiving door is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the bar and kitchen dishwashers. The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the sanitizer buckets/3-bay sink. Test strips must be obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of brown and black residues and other debris. Ice machine is to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026
Faucet of the 3-bay sink is in poor repair (leaking). Faucet is to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026
